en: Now, I'm going to open my fly.
And you're going to swallow what I give you to swallow.
ko: 그리고 네가 삼켜야 할 걸 삼킬 거야.

en: And when you swallow mine, you're going to swallow Rooster's.
ko: 네가 내 걸 삼키면, Rooster의 것도 삼킬 거야.

en: He done broke his nose. I think you ought to have something to show for it.
ko: 그는 코를 부러뜨렸어. 너도 뭔가 보여줘야 할 것 같아.

en: Anything you put in my mouth, you're going to lose.
ko: 내 입에 넣는 건 모두 잃게 될 거야.

en: You do that, and I'll put all eight inches of this steel in your ear.
ko: 그렇게 하면 이 강철 8인치를 네 귀에 꽂을 거야.

en: But you should know that sudden serious brain injury causes the victim to bite down hard.
ko: 하지만 갑작스러운 심각한 뇌 손상은 피해자가 강하게 물게 만든다는 걸 알아야 해.

en: In fact, I hear the bite reflex is so strong,
they have to pry the victim's jaws open with a crowbar.
ko: 피해자의 턱을 쇠지레로 벌려야 한다고 들었어.

en: Where did you get this shit?
You don't even know where to fuck.
ko: 너는 어디서 뭘 해야 할지도 모르잖아.
